s on these yogas. The following are some
of the Rajayogas leading to great opulence, authority and
kingship : —
(i) The planets occupying Taurus, Gemini. Leo, Virgo,
Sagittarius. Aquarius and Pisces.
(ii) They occupying Aries, Taurus, Libra and Pisces.
(hi) They be in Taurus, Sagittarius, Pisces and the four
angles.
(iv) They be in Aries, Leo, Virgo, Libra and Aquarius.
(v) If they be in the 3rd, 4th and 5th Bhavas.
(vi) If the 7 planets be in the 7 Bhavas viz, I, II, III, IV, V,
VII and IX.
(vii) If all the planets be posited in the Moon's Hora.
(viii) Beneftcs be in IX and XI Bhavas and maleftcs in VI
and X houses.
(ix) Benefics endowed with strength be in 1. IV, Vll and X
houses, and Mars and Saturn in IX and XI Bhavas.
(x) Four or more planets (other than the Moon) aspect the
Lagna or the Moon in Vargottamamsa. (According to some
the aspecting planets should be in IV, VII and X houses).
(xi) Venus occupying the asterism Asvini be in the Lagna
and be aspected by all the planets (i.
